## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] Follows the feature-module pattern (data via React Query hooks, no direct Axios/Supabase in components)
- [ ] Styled for both light and dark mode
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` committed
